meta.title: Resume OS — Evidence-Grounded Resume Agent
meta.description: A local-first agent for tailoring resumes to target jobs with reviewable, evidence-grounded changes.

workflow.title: Tailor with facts, not guesses
workflow.description: Build a trusted career profile, add a target job, then let the Agent propose changes you can verify.
workflow.profileMissing: Import a resume to establish your evidence base
workflow.profileUnverified: Demo and AI-created drafts are not verified career evidence
workflow.targetMissing: Add a job description to focus the analysis
workflow.agentWaiting: Waiting for career evidence and a target job
workflow.reviewWaiting: A validated job-specific variant will appear here
workflow.reviewReady: Variant ready for comparison and export
workflow.settingsReady: Provider, privacy, language, theme, and motion

agentStages.draft: Run created; waiting for job requirements.
agentStages.requirements-ready: Requirements are ready for evidence mapping.
agentStages.evidence-mapped: Evidence is mapped; the optimization plan is next.
agentStages.awaiting-answers: Waiting for your answers to evidence gaps.
agentStages.plan-ready: Optimization plan is ready for review.
agentStages.awaiting-plan-approval: Waiting for your approval of the plan.
agentStages.awaiting-change-approval: Changes are ready for per-item review.
agentStages.applied: A target-job resume variant is ready.
agentStages.stale: Inputs changed; this run must be refreshed.
agentStages.failed: The run stopped safely and can be reviewed.

workflow.nextProfile: Start by building your career profile
workflow.nextVerifiedProfile: Import or paste a real resume before starting job tailoring
workflow.nextTarget: Next, add the role you want to target
workflow.nextAgent: Next, resolve evidence gaps and approve a plan
workflow.nextReview: Next, compare the variant and export the result

desktop.error: This application could not be loaded.

agent.title: Evidence-Grounded Resume Agent
agent.description: Tailor the active resume to a target job using only supported career evidence. Missing facts become questions, and every proposed change remains reviewable.

workflow.title: Resumable tailoring workflow
workflow.loadError: The saved Agent run could not be restored from this browser.
workflow.saveError: The answer was not saved. No workflow state was changed.
workflow.noRunDescription: Analyze and save a target job before starting evidence mapping.
workflow.differentDraft: This run belongs to another resume
workflow.differentDraftDescription: Open the run’s source resume or analyze the target job again for this draft.

stages.requirements-ready: Requirements are ready for evidence mapping.
stages.awaiting-answers: Resolve each evidence gap before planning changes.
stages.awaiting-plan-approval: Review and approve the plan before generating changes.
stages.stale: Inputs changed; this run cannot be applied.

workflow.linkedFactRationale: The user explicitly linked and confirmed this career fact.
workflow.newFactRationale: The user supplied and confirmed this career fact in response to the gap.
workflow.gapRationale: The user explicitly confirmed that no supporting career fact exists.
workflow.evidenceReady: Evidence mapping is complete. Review the optimization plan next.
workflow.noOpenQuestions: There are no open evidence questions for this stage.
workflow.instructionRequired: Describe the target outcome before preparing a plan.
workflow.planError: The optimization plan could not be generated or verified.
workflow.planApproved: Plan approved. Evidence-linked change generation is now unlocked.

agent.instructionPlaceholder: Emphasize verified impact, tailor to the target role, or clarify a section...
agent.noSuggestions: Describe the target outcome to receive focused, evidence-linked edits.
agent.verificationPolicy: Review and verify every AI-proposed change for accuracy before accepting it.
agent.confirmEvidence: I verified this change is accurate: {value}
agent.variantReady: Job-specific variant prepared: {name}. Your master resume was not changed.

blocked.PROTECTED_FIELD: Blocked: edit this protected identity or history field manually
blocked.UNSTABLE_REORDER: Blocked: reordering requires stable item IDs
blocked.INVALID_ADD_FROM_FACT: Blocked: facts can only populate an experience bullet or project highlight
blocked.UNSAFE_REMOVE: Blocked: Resume OS does not automatically remove resume content

agent.createFirstDescription: The Agent only edits your saved drafts, never the built-in sample.
agent.planApprovalRequired: Approve the active optimization plan before generating changes.
agent.generationLocked: Change generation unlocks only after the active evidence plan is explicitly approved.
agent.stale: The resume changed while the Agent was working. Run the analysis again.
agent.applyError: This suggestion no longer matches the current resume.
agent.variantSaveError: The job-specific variant could not be saved locally. No suggestion was consumed.

errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Try again shortly.
errors.RATE_LIMITED_RETRY: Too many requests. Try again in {seconds, plural, one {# second} other {# seconds}}.
errors.INVALID_REQUEST: Check the instruction and resume, then try again.
errors.AI_NOT_CONFIGURED: The AI configuration is missing or unavailable. Check it in Settings and try again.
errors.AI_OUTPUT_INVALID: AI returned suggestions that could not be verified.
errors.CLOUD_FALLBACK_NOT_ALLOWED: The local model cannot run this task. Cloud fallback is off, so no resume data was sent.
errors.LOCAL_MODEL_UNAVAILABLE: Chrome Built-in AI is unavailable for this browser, device, or language.
errors.USER_ACTIVATION_REQUIRED: Click Analyze again to approve the local model download.
errors.CONTEXT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: This resume task is too large for the Chrome local model.
errors.INVALID_MODEL_OUTPUT: Chrome Built-in AI returned suggestions that could not be verified.
errors.RUN_SAVE_FAILED: The generated changes could not be saved to the resumable Agent run. No suggestion is available to apply.

agent.apiDescription: Questions are answered from the active structured resume through the AI provider configured in Settings:
agent.nextStep: Treat the answer as guidance and verify every career claim before reuse.
prompts: Which role requirements are directly supported by this resume?
Which achievements provide the strongest evidence of impact?
What transferable experience could bridge a partial match?
Which important requirements are not yet supported?
What should I verify before accepting these changes?
Generate a one-minute introduction using only supported facts

jdMatch.title: Target Job Analysis
jdMatch.description: Compare a job description with the active resume to see supported requirements, partial matches, and evidence gaps.
jdMatch.jobPlaceholder: Paste responsibilities, requirements, and preferred qualifications...
jdMatch.savedWorkflow: Target job and resumable Agent run saved in this browser.
jdMatch.requirementConfirmedLocally: Requirement confirmed for this review. Create the Agent run only after every requirement is confirmed.
jdMatch.localSaveFailed: Analysis is visible, but its Agent run could not be saved to browser storage.
jdMatch.requirementSaved: Requirement correction saved. The previous Agent run is now stale and cannot be applied.
jdMatch.requirementSaveFailed: The correction was not saved; the previous requirement remains active.
jdMatch.emptyReport: Run an analysis to see structured evidence and gaps.
jdMatch.createFirstDescription: Target Job Analysis compares the role with your active saved resume.
jdMatch.stale: The job description or active resume changed. Run the match again.

assessment.title: Requirement matrix
assessment.description: A deterministic view of each extracted job requirement and its current support status.
assessment.confirmationTitle: Confirm the matrix before the Agent can continue
assessment.confirmationDescription: Review requirements one by one, or confirm the remaining extracted requirements together. No plannable Agent run is saved until all requirements are confirmed.
assessment.evidencePolicy: Model classifications remain candidate signals only. A requirement stays a gap until verified career-fact IDs are linked; keywords and prose are not treated as evidence.
assessment.scoreSummary: Resume OS alignment and structure scores
assessment.coverageHelp: Direct = 100%, partial = 50%, and gap = 0%, combined using each reviewed requirement weight.
assessment.evidenceHelp: Only requirements with at least one verified career-evidence reference count here.
assessment.structureHelp: A deterministic code check of profile, contact, summary, experience, bullets, and skill structure.
assessment.missingEvidence: Missing — no verified career evidence is linked.
assessment.noAssessment: No assessment was returned; this requirement is treated as a gap.
assessment.saveToEdit: Save this analysis locally to review and correct the requirement.

errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Try again shortly.
errors.RATE_LIMITED_RETRY: Too many requests. Try again in {seconds, plural, one {# second} other {# seconds}}.
errors.PAYLOAD_TOO_LARGE: The job description is too large.
errors.INVALID_REQUEST: Check the job description and try again.
errors.AI_NOT_CONFIGURED: The AI configuration is missing or unavailable. Check it in Settings and try again.
errors.AI_OUTPUT_INVALID: AI returned a report that could not be verified.
errors.AI_OUTPUT_TOO_LARGE: AI returned a report that was too large.
errors.LOCAL_MODEL_UNAVAILABLE: Chrome local model is unavailable for this task or language. Choose another provider in Settings.
errors.CLOUD_FALLBACK_NOT_ALLOWED: The local model cannot run this task and cloud fallback is disabled. Review the provider choice in Settings.
errors.USER_ACTIVATION_REQUIRED: Click Analyze again to allow Chrome to download its local model.
errors.CONTEXT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: This resume and job description exceed the Chrome local model context limit.

jdMatch.nextStep: Review the evidence behind each match and verify any missing context.

projects.title: Project Explorer
projects.description: Explore projects from the active resume as reusable evidence of skills, ownership, and measurable impact.
projects.empty: No projects are available in this resume.
projects.notFoundDescription: This project is not available in the active resume.
projects.askAgentHint: Try asking: “Which target-job requirements can {name} support?”

timeline.title: Career Timeline
timeline.description: A chronological view of the experience and outcomes available as career evidence.
timeline.empty: No experience has been added to this resume.

terminal.title: resume-os terminal
terminal.welcome: Resume OS ready. Run a command to inspect the active resume.
terminal.placeholder: Type whoami, skills, projects, or help

classic.importRequired: Import a verified resume to review
classic.importRequiredDescription: Review & Export only uses a resume you pasted or uploaded. Demo, sample, and AI-created content are not treated as your career profile.
classic.qualityReport: Before and after deterministic quality report

resume3d.title: Resume 3D
resume3d.fallbackDescription: The 3D scene is unavailable. The same resume content remains available below.
resume3d.empty: Add experience, projects, or skills to build the 3D scene.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage how Resume OS looks, moves, and connects to AI services.
settings.appearanceDescription: Follow the operating system or choose a fixed theme.
settings.languageDescription: Switch language without leaving the current application.
settings.motionDescription: Use the system preference or choose full or reduced motion.
settings.layoutDescription: Restore default window positions without deleting resume drafts.
settings.resetWarning: Open windows, sizes, and positions will be reset. Resume drafts are preserved.
settings.providerPreferenceDescription: Choose local Chrome AI, your own configured AI, or automatic routing that follows your privacy preference.
settings.providerPrivacyNote: All AI features use the saved selection. Chrome Built-in AI runs supported tasks on this device. Cloud tasks use the saved Base URL and model, and send only the context required for that task.

providerDescriptions.chromeBuiltIn: Use Chrome's browser-managed on-device model for Studio parsing, demo generation, and supported Agent tasks; no API key is required.
providerDescriptions.openAiCompatible: Use the Base URL, model, and API key you provide below.
providerDescriptions.automatic: Prefer the local model; stop when it cannot run the task unless fallback is allowed.

settings.allowCloudFallbackDescription: Your saved consent lets Resume OS send only the required task context to your configured cloud provider when the local model is unavailable or cannot fit the bounded task.
settings.chromeLanguageBoundary: Chrome does not officially guarantee Chinese Prompt API output yet. Chinese tasks use an experimental best-effort local session, remain schema-validated, and never cross to cloud without saved consent.
settings.aiProviderDescription: Configure an OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Custom service hosts must be allowed by the deployment.
settings.aiPrivacyNote: Your key and career data stay in this browser until an AI task sends the necessary context to your chosen provider. Resume OS does not persist them on its server.
settings.rememberAiKey: Remember the key on this device
settings.aiConfigSavedSession: Configuration saved. The key stays in this session only.
settings.aiConfigSavedDevice: Configuration saved. The key will remain on this device.
settings.aiConfigInvalid: Complete the Base URL, model, and API key.
settings.diagnosticsDescription: Check the selected AI only here. Local mode runs an on-device prompt; self-configured mode checks the saved connection.
settings.diagnosticsDownload: Chrome is downloading or updating local model resources: {progress}%
settings.diagnosticsPrompt: Reply with a short service status.

diagnosticErrors.apiUnavailable: This Chrome does not expose the built-in Prompt API (window.LanguageModel). Use a supported Chrome version and make sure built-in AI is enabled on an eligible device.
diagnosticErrors.localModelUnavailable: The local model is unavailable for this Chrome, device, or {language} task.
diagnosticErrors.userActivationRequired: Chrome needs a new user action to download the local model. Click the check again.
diagnosticErrors.contextLimitExceeded: The local model cannot fit the diagnostic task right now.
diagnosticErrors.invalidModelOutput: The local model responded, but its result failed validation.
diagnosticErrors.cloudFallbackNotAllowed: The local model is unavailable and automatic fallback to self-configured AI is not allowed.

errors.AI_PUBLIC_ACCESS_DISABLED: AI access is not allowed from this request origin.
errors.AI_ACCESS_MISCONFIGURED: AI server access is not configured safely.
errors.FORBIDDEN: This request is not allowed from the current origin.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Try again shortly.
errors.INVALID_REQUEST: Check the provided information and try again.
errors.AI_NOT_CONFIGURED: The AI configuration is missing or unavailable. Check it in Settings and try again.

studio.title: Resume Studio
studio.fileHint: PDF, DOCX, or TXT · 3 MiB maximum
studio.extractedPlaceholder: Extracted text remains here for review
studio.providerRoutingHint: Parsing and generation use the provider and model saved in Settings. The initial saved provider is local; cloud is used only when explicitly selected or allowed as fallback.
studio.localModelDownload: Chrome is downloading or updating local model resources: {progress}%
studio.sampleDescription: Load a fully fictional resume locally. No AI request is made.
studio.emptyPreviewDescription: Paste text, upload a file, or explicitly load the anonymous sample from Demo / Sandbox.
studio.sourceRequired: Enter resume text before creating a draft.
studio.roleRequired: Enter a target role before generating a resume.
studio.uploadError: Unable to process the uploaded resume

careerEvidence.title: Career evidence
careerEvidence.description: Review facts imported from this resume before the agent is allowed to use them.
careerEvidence.noDraft: Import a real resume to start a local Career Profile.
careerEvidence.excluded: Demo, sample, and AI-created drafts are excluded from Career Evidence.
careerEvidence.empty: No locally saved evidence was found for this draft.
careerEvidence.storageError: Local Career Evidence is unavailable. No facts are being shown as saved.
careerEvidence.importStorageError: The draft was created, but its Career Evidence was not saved locally.
careerEvidence.updateError: The local fact could not be updated.
careerEvidence.deleteRestricted: This fact is used by a requirement match or agent run and cannot be deleted.
careerEvidence.deleteDraftBlocked: This draft is used by a saved resume variant or agent run and cannot be deleted.

errors.AI_PUBLIC_ACCESS_DISABLED: AI access is not allowed from this request origin.
errors.AI_ACCESS_MISCONFIGURED: AI server access is not configured safely.
errors.FORBIDDEN: This request is not allowed from the current origin.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Try again shortly.
errors.RATE_LIMITED_RETRY: Too many requests. Try again in {seconds, plural, one {# second} other {# seconds}}.
errors.INVALID_REQUEST: Check the provided information and try again.
errors.CONTENT_LENGTH_REQUIRED: The upload size could not be verified.
errors.UNSUPPORTED_FILE: Use a PDF, DOCX, or TXT resume file.
errors.INVALID_FILE_SIGNATURE: The file contents do not match its type.
errors.EMPTY_TEXT: No readable resume text was found.
errors.EXTRACTION_LIMIT: The resume exceeds the extraction limits.
errors.EXTRACTION_FAILED: The resume text could not be extracted.
errors.AI_NOT_CONFIGURED: The AI configuration is missing or unavailable. Check it in Settings and try again.
errors.AI_OUTPUT_TOO_LARGE: AI returned more resume data than allowed.
errors.LOCAL_MODEL_UNAVAILABLE: The selected Chrome local model cannot run this task or language. Check AI Settings or select a configured provider.
errors.CLOUD_FALLBACK_NOT_ALLOWED: The local model cannot run this task and cloud fallback is disabled. Check AI Settings.
errors.USER_ACTIVATION_REQUIRED: Chrome needs a new user action before downloading the local model. Click the action again.
errors.CONTEXT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: This resume task exceeds the Chrome local model context limit. Use a shorter input or select a configured provider.
